form.createDescription: Create a new invoice for a patient.

void.title: Void invoice
void.description: Voiding removes this invoice from active collections. Use it only for genuine front-desk or billing corrections.
void.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason before voiding the invoice.
void.reasonPlaceholder: Entered under the wrong patient, duplicate invoice, billing correction, etc.

payment.title: Post payment
payment.description: Record a collected payment against this invoice and keep the remaining balance accurate.
payment.notesPlaceholder: Walk-in payment, insurer batch, split settlement notes, etc.
payment.postedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No posted payments} one {# posted payment} other {# posted payments}}

paywall.title: Subscription Access Paused
paywall.description: Renew or upgrade the clinic subscription to continue using restricted modules.
